title: prenanthes sumatrana
intro: Prenanthes sumatrana, also known as Sumatran coneflower, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Prenanthes sumatrana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Prenanthes sumatrana include tea infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
